title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during an outing with Kitasan Black...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look! They have Cuties over there! Aw, they
sure take me back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.
choice_data_list: They bring you back, you say?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Dia's super awesome at claw machines!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Before I entered Tracen, I'd always play a round
or two on the way back from watching a race. I
would try to get the ones that look like Teio and
the others!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It looks like they've added more varieties since
then. I'm really bad at these games, so I never
managed to win anything. Haha.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black appears to be drawn to the
plushies. In that case...
choice_data_list: I'll win some for you, then!
I'll win some for you, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
